overall.description: First-person exploration of the Afterlife bar from Cyberpunk 2077. The player character walks from the main bar counter through the neon-lit interior, visits a back room with a memorial shrine, and ascends to an upper balcony level. The environment features heavy cyberpunk aesthetic with green, red, and purple neon lighting.

agents.ego_description: standing at the bar counter observing the bartender and surroundings before beginning to pan right

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the bar counter wiping a glass

entered.detail: long white bar counter with neon green edge lighting
illuminated sign with Japanese characters and 'AFTERLIFE' text
backlit shelves filled with bottles behind the bar
horizontal green neon light strips along the bar architecture
metal railing of the upper level visible above the main floor

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at the bar counter of a cyberpunk establishment, bathed in green neon light. The bartender stands behind the counter as the camera slowly pans right, revealing the liquor shelves and the upper balcony level in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: main bar floor with pool tables and red ambient lighting

events.description: moving from enclosed bar counter into the open main floor area
turning toward the back room entrance while passing the pool table

agents.ego_description: walking through the main bar area past round tables and the pool table toward the back of the establishment

entered.detail: white pool table with balls and cues arranged for play
row of glowing arcade cabinets against the far wall
circular tables with chairs scattered across the floor
red neon tubes illuminating the floor area

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the bar into the open main floor, where red lighting mixes with the green neon. The pool table comes into view on the right as the player walks deeper into the establishment, passing arcade machines and tables.

scene_state.functional_zone: back room lounge with purple lighting and memorial shrine

events.description: entering the back room lounge area with distinct purple lighting
lighting shifts from red and green to purple and blue tones

agents.ego_description: entering the back room and approaching the memorial shrine with candles and photographs

notable_agents.action: person with purple hair sitting on red couch looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: long red velvet couch against the left wall
table with candles, photographs, and offerings against the back wall
concert posters and graffiti on the wall above the couch
table covered with purple cloth holding various items
fluorescent light fixture and air conditioning unit mounted high on the wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a secluded back room with purple and blue lighting, featuring a red couch where an NPC sits. The camera focuses on a memorial shrine with candles and photographs at the far end, surrounded by band posters and graffiti.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level stairwell and balcony with graffiti walls

events.description: ascending the concrete stairs to the upper level
reaching the upper balcony overlooking the main floor

agents.ego_description: walking up the stairs and exploring the upper balcony area with graffiti art and neon signs

entered.detail: concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward
wall covered with large skull graffiti and neon green tubes
large illuminated letter V with red roses at its base
tables and seating on the upper balcony level

segments.scene_description: The player exits the back room and ascends a stairwell with graffiti-covered walls and a large neon 'V' sign. Upon reaching the upper balcony, the camera pans across the railing overlooking the main floor, showing the upper level tables and the neon-lit environment from above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched cyberpunk bar that transitions from the bustling main floor to a secluded memorial and finally to an elevated vantage point. It begins at the bar counter under a green neon glow, panning right past the bartender and liquor shelves to reveal the layout of the establishment. As the camera moves into the open main floor, the lighting shifts to a mix of red and green while passing by arcade machines and a pool table. The scene then narrows into a secluded back room bathed in purple and blue light, focusing on a memorial shrine with candles and photographs before turning back toward the exit. Finally, the camera ascends a graffiti-covered stairwell past a large neon V sign to reach an upper balcony, panning across the railing to overlook the entire neon-lit environment from above.
